categories.name: Refrigerator
categories.egyptNotes: Inverter models help with power; check energy rating; side-by-side vs French door vs top freezer depends on kitchen width and cooking habits. Popular brands in EG: Samsung, LG, Fresh, Toshiba, Beko, Sharp, Electrolux. Buy from authorized dealer for warranty.
questionsToResolve: top freezer vs bottom vs French vs SBS

categories.name: Cooker / hob + oven
categories.egyptNotes: Already owned/gifted — do not repurchase. Optional later: range hood if missing and kitchen needs extraction.

categories.name: Washing machine
categories.egyptNotes: Front-load vs top-load; dryer rare / expensive energy-wise — many hang dry on balcony.

categories.name: Air conditioning
categories.egyptNotes: User decision 2026-07-17: NOT purchasing AC. Focus heat mitigation via curtains, fans, ventilation, lighter textiles.

categories.name: Water heater
categories.egyptNotes: Electric storage vs instantaneous vs gas — depends on building and bathrooms count.

categories.name: Lighting plan
categories.egyptNotes: Layer ambient + task + accent. LED only. Warm white (~2700–3000K) for living/bedroom; neutral for kitchen/bath.

categories.name: Small kitchen appliances
categories.egyptNotes: Already have: air fryer, kettle, blender. Iron and vacuum also owned. Optional later: microwave, coffee maker, toaster if lifestyle needs them.

categories.name: Living furniture
categories.egyptNotes: Sofa depth and fabric matter in dusty cities; consider washable covers.

categories.name: Bedroom furniture
categories.egyptNotes: Mattress quality > frame. Wardrobe built-in vs freestanding depends on apartment.

categories.name: Curtains / blinds
categories.egyptNotes: Blackout for bedrooms is almost always worth it; heat + privacy.

categories.name: Second bedroom setup
categories.egyptNotes: No kids = office, guest, gym corner, or hybrid. Decide use before buying furniture.
